productDisplayName: Peter England Men Check Blue Shirt
description: Composition Blue and white check shirt made of a cotton blend fabric, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar with a buttoned front placket, patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hem Fitting Nuvo Wash care Wash separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach Drip dry Warm iron Designed for the confident executive and crafted from a cotton blend fabric to offer wrinkle-free comfort, this checked formal shirt from peter england is stitched to perfection offering exemplary comfort. Pair it with crisp formals, a blazer, classy accessories and rich leather formal shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
